content:
Task task-024 completed: Task was already completed by a previous worker session (commit 31c93dd). Verified all required components exist and meet task requirements:

1. **TimerScreen.tsx**: Main timer interface with:
   - Header with connection status indicator (connected/reconnecting/disconnected)
   - Timer display integration via TimerDisplay component
   - Category selection (readonly when timer active, editable when idle)
   - Quick notes input section shown when stopping timer
   - TimerControls for Start/Stop buttons
   - Responsive layout using SafeAreaView, KeyboardAvoidingView, ScrollView
   - Real-time sync via useRealtimeTimer hook
   - Platform-aware alerts (Alert.alert on native, alert() on web)

2. **TimerDisplay.tsx**: Shows large HH:MM:SS format (fontSizes.display + 16), updates every second via useTimerStore, shows 'No active timer' with dimmed 00:00:00 when idle, status text shows Running/Paused/No active timer

3. **TimerControls.tsx**: Start button (primary variant) when no timer, Stop button (danger variant) when active, loading and disabled states via isStarting/isStopping props, accessibility labels and hints

4. **CategorySelector.tsx**: Modal with user's categories including color swatches AND type badges, 'No category' option at top, FlatList for efficient rendering, selected state with checkmark, loading spinner while fetching categories

5. **QuickEntry.tsx**: Manual time entry component with category selector, date picker, duration input, notes field

6. **index.ts**: Barrel exports for all timer components

All components use theme tokens (colors, spacing, borderRadius, fontSizes), proper TypeScript typing, and follow the UI component patterns established in task-006. Contract was already registered as "Timer Screen Components".

Task task-026 completed: Committed and verified History Screen implementation (commit 0257983):

**HistoryScreen.tsx:**
- Main screen integrating useTimeEntries infinite query with filters
- Accepts route params for pre-filtering (categoryId, dateStart, dateEnd)
- Entry count display with "+" indicator when hasNextPage
- Error state handling with retry message
- Navigation to EntryEdit modal on entry press
- Uses useCategories hook for category lookups

**HistoryFilters.tsx:**
- Expandable filter panel with active indicator dot
- Date range pickers (YYYY-MM-DD text inputs with validation)
- Category selector modal showing colors AND types
- Notes search input with 300ms debounce (useRef timeout)
- Duration preset chips (< 30m, 30m-1h, 1h-2h, 2h-4h, > 4h)
- Clear all filters button
- Disabled state support during loading

**EntryList.tsx:**
- FlatList with infinite scroll (onEndReachedThreshold=0.3)
- Pull-to-refresh via RefreshControl with themed colors
- Entries grouped by date with section headers (Today/Yesterday/formatted date)
- Loading skeleton during initial fetch (5 placeholder cards)
- Empty state with icon and customizable message
- Performance optimizations (removeClippedSubviews, maxToRenderPerBatch=10, windowSize=5)
- Accessibility (accessibilityRole="list")

**EntryCard.tsx:**
- Category color chip (12px rounded square)
- Category type badge
- Date with Today/Yesterday smart labels
- Start-end time range display (HH:MM 24h format)
- Duration badge with hours/minutes formatting
- Notes preview truncated to 80 chars with ellipsis
- Edit button with Icon component
- Pressable card with onPress support

**Definition of Done:**
- Input validation: Filters validated via TimeEntryFiltersSchema
- Auth: RLS policies enforce user_id server-side
- Error handling: Error state displayed with retry message
- Type safety: npx tsc passes (except unrelated victory-native deps from task-029)
- Git committed: 0257983

Contract registered: "History Screen Components"

Task task-027 completed: Created EntryEditModal component (src/components/history/EntryEditModal.tsx) for editing and deleting time entries:

Features implemented:
- Pre-fills form with existing entry data (category, start/end date+time, notes)
- Category selector modal for changing entry category  
- Date inputs (YYYY-MM-DD format) and time inputs (HH:MM format) with validation
- Automatic duration calculation displayed when start and end times are valid
- Delete button with platform-aware confirmation dialog (Alert on native, window.confirm on web)
- Full validation against UpdateTimeEntrySchema before mutation
- Uses useUpdateTimeEntry and useDeleteTimeEntry hooks with optimistic updates and rollback
- Defensive user_id check to prevent editing other users' entries (RLS also handles server-side)
- Keyboard-aware modal using KeyboardAvoidingView on iOS
- Loading states during mutations with disabled form controls
- Error display for validation and server errors

Also updated:
- Added 'alert' icon to Icon component for warning states
- Exported EntryEditModal from history components barrel

Commit: 73fbc95
